misc.text: Except @SHAQ's wearing a shirt promoting the live action which is a grand total of 16 episodes that I have no doubt he's seen. The fact of the matter is we just don't like you @LoganPaul. Go back to getting punched in the face for a living since it's what your best at. 👍 Logan Paul (@LoganPaul) Look at this larper LOL!! @SHAQ The way I see it, only people who have read all 108 volumes and 1100 chapters of the One Piece manga, watched all 1100 episodes of the anime, went to at least TWO Comic Cons cosplaying as Monkey D Luffy, and watched both seasons of the live action should even be allowed to SAY the name “One Piece” let alone wear One Piece merchandise! shame on you Shaquille O’Neal 🤮 one piece community let’s get him!! — https://nitter.net/LoganPaul/status/2049910331489628625#m

misc.title: 📢 GET READY, ONE PIECE FANS! 🏴‍☠️ This summer, the first-ever ONE PIECE Fest, is setting sail to Cosm Los Angeles! Held only on Tuesday, August 25 & Wednesday, August 26. Join us for a brand-new, on
misc.text: 📢 GET READY, ONE PIECE FANS! 🏴‍☠️ This summer, the first-ever ONE PIECE Fest, is setting sail to Cosm Los Angeles! Held only on Tuesday, August 25 & Wednesday, August 26. Join us for a brand-new, one-of-a-kind celebration event for all ONE PIECE fans that includes panels, live music performances, activations, giveaways, exclusive merchandise, a specially-produced immersive experience into Elbaph on Cosm’s stunning LED Dome, and more! Stay tuned for more details. Starting now, enter our Ticket Lottery for a chance to buy advanced tickets. Ticket Lottery closes at 11:59 pm ET on May 14th. Selected fans will be notified via email on May 21st with ticket purchase details. ▼For more details, check out our Official Website: onepiece-fest.com LET'S GO!!! #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECEFEST

misc.title: Ufotable has revealed that art director Kazuo Ebisawa passed away on April 14. A funeral was held on April 20. Works he contributed include Fate/Zero, Fate/Stay Night: UBW and HF, Kara no Kyoukai, Kim
misc.text: Ufotable has revealed that art director Kazuo Ebisawa passed away on April 14. A funeral was held on April 20. Works he contributed include Fate/Zero, Fate/Stay Night: UBW and HF, Kara no Kyoukai, Kimetsu no Yaiba, Tales of Zestiria and Berseria, God Eater, and many other works inside and outside of ufotable. ufotable.com/news/article/27…

Join us for a brand-new, one-of-a-kind celebration event for all ONE PIECE fans that includes panels, live music performances, activations, giveaways, exclusive merchandise, a specially-produced immersive experience into Elbaph on Cosm’s stunning LED Dome, and more! Stay tuned for more details. Starting now, enter our Ticket Lottery for a chance to buy advanced tickets. Ticket Lottery closes at 11:59 pm ET on May 14th. Selected fans will be notified via email on May 21st with ticket purchase details. ▼For more details, check out our Official Website: onepiece-fest.com LET'S GO!!! #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECEFEST
